problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
